original: 8 . Vipallāsakathā
content: 8.顛倒的談論

original: 236. Purimanidānaṃ .
content: 236.[同]之前的起源(因由)。

original: ‘‘ Cattārome , bhikkhave[ a. ni.4.49 passitabbā], saññāvipallāsā cittavipallāsā diṭṭhivipallāsā.
content: 「[[bhikkhu#比丘]]們！有這四種顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見，

original: Katame cattāro?
content: 哪四種？

original: Anicce, bhikkhave, niccanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於無常為常』是顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見；

original: Dukkhe, bhikkhave, sukhanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於苦為樂』是顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見；

original: Anattani, bhikkhave, attāti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於[[anattā#無我]]為我』是顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見；

original: Asubhe, bhikkhave, subhanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於不淨為淨』是顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見，

original: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro saññāvipallāsā cittavipallāsā diṭṭhivipallāsā.
content: 比丘們！這是四種顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見。

original: ‘ ‘ Cattārome, bhikkhave, nasaññāvipallāsā nacittavipallāsā nadiṭṭhivipallāsā.
content: 比丘們！有這四種不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見，

original: Katame cattāro?
content: 哪四種？

original: Anicce, bhikkhave, aniccanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於無常為無常』是不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見；

original: Dukkhe, bhikkhave, dukkhanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於苦為苦』是不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見；

original: Anattani, bhikkhave, anattāti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於無我為無我』是不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見；

original: Asubhe, bhikkhave, asubhanti nasaññāvipallāso nacittavipallāso nadiṭṭhivipallāso.
content: 『於不淨為不淨』是不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見，

original: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro nasaññāvipallāsā nacittavipallāsā nadiṭṭhivipallāsā’’ ti.
content: 比丘們！這是四種不顛倒想、不顛倒心、不顛倒見。」

original: ‘ ‘ Anicce niccasaññino, dukkhe ca sukhasaññino;
content: 「於無常為常想，於苦為樂想，

original: Anattani ca attāti[ attasaññino( syā.) a. ni.4.49 passitabbā], asubhe subhasaññino;
content: 於無我為我想，於不淨為淨想，

original: Micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā, khittacittā visaññino.
content: 眾生被邪見殺害，心被混亂、想被扭曲(發狂)。

original: ‘ ‘ Te yogayuttā mārassa, ayogakkhemino janā;
content: 他們被魔之軛所軛，成為非[[yogakkhemaṃ#軛安穩]]之人，

original: Sattā gacchanti saṃsāraṃ, jātimaraṇagāmino.
content: 眾生走入輪迴，來到生與死。

original: ‘ ‘ Yadā ca buddhā lokasmiṃ, uppajjanti pabhaṅkarā;
content: 但當[[buddho#佛陀]]們在世間出現，為光之作者，

original: Te imaṃ dhammaṃ pakāsenti, dukkhūpasamagāminaṃ.
content: 他們告知這個，導向苦的止息之法。

original: ‘ ‘ Tesaṃ sutvāna sappaññā, sacittaṃ paccaladdhu[ paccaladdhuṃ( syā.), paccaladdhā a. ni.4.49] te;
content: 那些有慧者聽聞後，他們獲得自己的心，

original: Aniccaṃ aniccato dakkhuṃ, dukkhamaddakkhu dukkhato.
content: 他們看無常為無常，看苦為苦，

original: ‘ ‘ Anattani anattāti, asubhaṃ asubhataddasuṃ;
content: 無我為『無我』，看不淨為不淨

original: Sammādiṭṭhisamādānā , sabbaṃ dukkhaṃ upaccagun’’ ti.
content: 以正見的受持，超越一切苦。」[AN.4.49]

original: Ime cattāro vipallāsā diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa pahīnā, appahīnāti.
content: 對{{note|trigger=見具足的人|text=「見具足的人」(diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa)，《顯揚正法》以須陀洹者(sotāpannassa)解說。依此，須陀洹未斷樂想、淨想、樂心、淨心「四顛倒」。}}，這四種顛倒有已捨斷，有未捨斷。

original: Keci pahīnā, keci appahīnā?
content: 哪些已捨斷，哪些未捨斷？

original: Anicce niccanti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.
content: 「於無常為常」之顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見已捨斷；

original: Dukkhe sukhanti saññā uppajjati, cittaṃ uppajjati, diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.
content: 「於苦為樂」之想生起，心生起，顛倒見已捨斷；

original: Anattani attāti saññāvipallāso cittavipallāso diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.
content: 「於無我為我」之顛倒想、顛倒心、顛倒見已捨斷；

original: Asubhe subhanti saññā uppajjati, cittaṃ uppajjati, diṭṭhivipallāso pahīno.
content: 「於不淨為淨」之想生起，心生起，顛倒見已捨斷。

original: Dvīsu vatthūsu cha vipallāsā pahīnā .
content: 在二事上六顛倒已捨斷；

original: Dvīsu vatthūsu dve vipallāsā pahīnā, cattāro vipallāsā appahīnā.
content: 在二事上二顛倒已捨斷，四顛倒未捨斷；

original: Catūsu vatthūsu aṭṭha vipallāsā pahīnā, cattāro vipallāsā appahīnāti.
content: 在四事上八顛倒已捨斷，四顛倒未捨斷。

original: Vipallāsakathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 顛倒的談論終了。
